infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: TravelRavers uses Bluetooth for offline mesh networking to stay in sync with your squad without cell signal.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: TravelRavers uses Bluetooth for offline mesh networking.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to show where you are on the festival map and help your squad find you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We need background location access so your squad can see where you are even when the app is minimised.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TravelRavers needs location access to show your position on the tactical map and share it with your squad.
